name: AgentJet: A Distributed Swarm Training Framework for Agentic Reinforcement Learning

description: arXiv:2606.04484v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Training reinforcement learning (RL) policies for large language model (LLM) agents requires optimizing multi-turn trajectories that interact with external environments. Existing training frameworks struggle with runtime failures, single-model constraints, incompatible task environments, and redundant context. We present AgentJet, a distribute...
author: Qingxu Fu, Boyin Liu, Shuchang Tao, Zhaoyang Liu, Cheng Chen, Xuanfa Jin, Rong Zhu, Bolin Ding
